name: SNK
description: Japanese arcade and console developer known for Neo Geo, The King of Fighters, Fatal Fury, Metal Slug, and Samurai Shodown.

eras.title: Arcade Foundation
eras.description: Early arcade period leading into recognizable SNK action and shooting games.

eras.title: Neo Geo Era
eras.description: SNK's defining arcade and home-console identity through Neo Geo hardware and fighting games.

eras.title: Playmore Recovery
eras.description: Post-bankruptcy revival period under Playmore and SNK Playmore branding.

eras.title: Modern SNK
eras.description: Restored SNK branding and renewed focus on legacy fighting franchises.

notes: This entry represents the SNK brand lineage for curation, despite the original company's bankruptcy and later Playmore/SNK corporate continuity.
